codeReview.summary: Fail. The latest fix session does not resolve the prior blocking failure. Latest feature commit `0cf5417...` is a scrutiny artifact commit with no switcher implementation changes, while current `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` still rely on renderability/store-proxy assertions instead of concrete rendered indicators, UI-action callbacks, and launch invocation traces required by the feature contract.

issues.description: Latest feature commit `0cf5417116be732d49896716519067940053f545` modifies only scrutiny artifacts (`.factory/validation/...`) and contains no implementation/test changes for this feature (confirmed via `git show --stat 0cf5417...`).

`test_ui_crossSurface_dashboardRendersCreatedProfile_withActiveIndicator` still asserts only `XCTAssertNotNil` renderability (lines 2430, 2434), not concrete rendered indicator seams (`testActiveProfileDisplayName` / `testActiveProfileAccessibilityLabel`) required by expected behavior.

`test_ui_crossSurface_popoverRendersCreatedProfile_withActiveIndicator` still uses renderability-only assertions (`XCTAssertNotNil` at lines 2475, 2479) instead of concrete rendered label/accessibility assertions.

Cross-surface switching proofs remain store-driven (`localStore.setActiveProfile` at lines 2531 and 2597) rather than UI-action-driven via `testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` / `testTriggerSwitchViaUIAction` as required.

Launch-chain assertions remain store-inference/comment-based (`"Launch adapter would use ..."` at lines 2799 and 2864) instead of concrete launch invocation trace evidence (e.g., `getLastAttemptedProfileID`) from UI-driven switch+launch flow.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `switcher-ui-worker` procedure includes manual UI sanity checks, but handoff marks `followedProcedure=true` while providing no interactive checks evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ` .factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 requires manual UI sanity checks; handoff `2026-04-10T08-22-34-081Z__...__3e0058ae-96b2-4f70-a6e6-977a9940a193.json` has `verification.interactiveChecks: []` and `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Reviewed latest fix session `3e0058ae-96b2-4f70-a6e6-977a9940a193`, prior synthesis (`round7`), prior review, transcript skeleton, and both prior/latest feature diffs (`f8ffd58...` and `0cf5417...`). The fix is not adequate: latest commit has no implementation changes, and required crossflow assertions (concrete rendered indicators, UI-action-driven switch evidence, and launch invocation trace proof) are still missing in current `SwitcherCrossFlowTests`.
